nasb.text: Suddenly the Lord said to Moses and Aaron and to Miriam, “You three come out to the tent of meeting.” So the three of them came out.

esv.text: And suddenly the Lord said to Moses and to Aaron and Miriam, “Come out, you three, to the tent of meeting.” And the three of them came out.

cnv.text: 耶和華忽然對摩西、亞倫和米利暗說：“你們三個人都出來，到會幕那裡去。”他們三個人就出來。

ccb.text: 耶和华立刻对摩西、亚伦和米利暗说：“你们三人都到会幕去。”他们就去了。
